name: bright-data-mcp
description: Bright Data web scraping MCP server — scrape_as_html EIT (Embedded Instruction Trigger) vector; indirect prompt injection via scraped web content (arXiv:2509.06572)
version_note: Version 1.1.0 is the estimated npm stable release closest to the paper submission date (September 2025).
benchmark_note: Exact version used in arXiv:2509.06572 is not disclosed; 1.1.0 is the best estimate based on the package's npm release timeline around that date.
